info.title: PressPass API
info.description: REST API for issuing, administration and verification of electronic press credentials.

resendApiKey.description: Resend API key; порожній рядок очищає (повертає до env)

cardId.description: Id of the card to make primary

journalistId.description: Journalist id the card is issued to

editorialId.description: Issuing company (редакція) id; forced to their own for an editorial admin

cardNumber.description: Card number; generated automatically when omitted

encryptionPassphrase.description: Distinct passphrase wrapping the administrator KEK
